text: is it dumb to move to goa just because i need a vibe change
just move bro, life's short, can't waste it in dead places
nah but the scary part is you actually have to like... book it and go, not just romanticize leaving
hmm let me think about that...
okay but what's actually wrong rn
literally did this and spent three months romanticizing before actually going lol, are you in the thinking phase or like actually packing
wait you're just gonna feel the same tho
that's cap tho, depends what you're running from
wait are you running to goa or away from something else tho
tanmay ur right lol, i think i'm actually running TO something not away, like i just need creative people around me ngl
wait but will goa actually have creatives or just vibes lmao
that's the whole insight right there — now just actually check if goa has those people lol, don't want a six month vibe hangover
okay but that's literally everyone's plan bro
nah but do you actually know anyone in goa tho
wait do you actually have someone there already or is this a solo move because that's the difference between cool and lonely lol
wait but like what are you actually gonna build in goa tho
okay but finding five actual creatives in goa hits different than romanticizing it

hmm let me think about that...
